title: Rhama #4471
definition:
Ramah = "a hill"

 1) a town of the tribe of Benjamin, situated about 5 miles (8 km)
    north of Jerusalem on the road to Bethel
nasbUsage:

    north of Jerusalem on the road to Bethel

    NASB:  Ramah, a city N. of Jer.:
